name: io.github.mobileappbyharis/navi-x402-mcp
description: Paid agent tools with zero API keys: crypto prices, weather, translation, web intelligence, market reports and x402 service discovery. Pay-per-call in USDC on Base via the x402 protocol.

environmentVariables.name: X402_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key of the paying wallet (USDC on Base mainnet). Signs x402 payment authorizations locally.
